# Whatweb

```zsh
┌──(koshi㉿kali)-[~/Exam/AD/SRV]
└─$ whatweb -v -a3 --log-verbose WebEnum/whatweb_8080.txt http://$TargetIP:8080                     

WhatWeb report for http://172.16.104.202:8080
Status    : 403 Forbidden
Title     : <None>
IP        : 172.16.104.202
Country   : RESERVED, ZZ

Summary   : Cookies[JSESSIONID.45f2994f], HTTPServer[Jetty(10.0.20)], HttpOnly[JSESSIONID.45f2994f], Jenkins[2.440.3], Jetty[10.0.20], Meta-Refresh-Redirect[/login?from=%2F], Script, UncommonHeaders[x-content-type-options,x-hudson,x-jenkins,x-jenkins-session]

Detected Plugins:
[ Cookies ]
        Display the names of cookies in the HTTP headers. The 
        values are not returned to save on space. 

        String       : JSESSIONID.45f2994f

[ HTTPServer ]
        HTTP server header string. This plugin also attempts to 
        identify the operating system from the server header. 

        String       : Jetty(10.0.20) (from server string)

[ HttpOnly ]
        If the HttpOnly flag is included in the HTTP set-cookie 
        response header and the browser supports it then the cookie 
        cannot be accessed through client side script - More Info: 
        http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/HTTP_cookie 

        String       : JSESSIONID.45f2994f

[ Jenkins ]
        Jenkins is an application that monitors executions of 
        repeated jobs, such as building a software project or jobs 
        run by cron. 

        Version      : 2.440.3
        Google Dorks: (1)
        Website     : http://jenkins-ci.org/

[ Jetty ]
        Jetty is a pure Java application server. Jetty provides an 
        HTTP server, HTTP client, and javax.servlet container. 

        Version      : 10.0.20
        Google Dorks: (1)
        Website     : http://jetty.codehaus.org/jetty/

[ Meta-Refresh-Redirect ]
        Meta refresh tag is a deprecated URL element that can be 
        used to optionally wait x seconds before reloading the 
        current page or loading a new page. More info: 
        https://secure.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/wiki/Meta_refresh 

        String       : /login?from=%2F

[ Script ]
        This plugin detects instances of script HTML elements and 
        returns the script language/type. 


[ UncommonHeaders ]
        Uncommon HTTP server headers. The blacklist includes all 
        the standard headers and many non standard but common ones. 
        Interesting but fairly common headers should have their own 
        plugins, eg. x-powered-by, server and x-aspnet-version. 
        Info about headers can be found at www.http-stats.com 

        String       : x-content-type-options,x-hudson,x-jenkins,x-jenkins-session (from headers)

HTTP Headers:
        HTTP/1.1 403 Forbidden
        Date: Sun, 22 Feb 2026 09:49:05 GMT
        Connection: close
        X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
        Set-Cookie: JSESSIONID.45f2994f=node01upg0v5saazn6110rxvzwiqjaw31.node0; Path=/; HttpOnly
        Expires: Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:00 GMT
        Content-Type: text/html;charset=utf-8
        X-Hudson: 1.395
        X-Jenkins: 2.440.3
        X-Jenkins-Session: 899b0ecb
        Server: Jetty(10.0.20)

WhatWeb report for http://172.16.104.202:8080/login?from=%2F
Status    : 200 OK
Title     : Sign in [Jenkins]
IP        : 172.16.104.202
Country   : RESERVED, ZZ

Summary   : HTML5, HTTPServer[Jetty(10.0.20)], Jenkins[2.440.3], Jetty[10.0.20], PasswordField[j_password], Script[application/json,text/javascript], UncommonHeaders[x-content-type-options,x-hudson,x-jenkins,x-jenkins-session,x-instance-identity], X-Frame-Options[sameorigin]

[ HTML5 ]

[ HTTPServer ]
        HTTP server header string. This plugin also attempts to

[ Jenkins ]
        Jenkins is an application that monitors executions of

[ Script ]

[ UncommonHeaders ]
        Uncommon HTTP server headers. The blacklist includes all

[ X-Frame-Options ]
        This plugin retrieves the X-Frame-Options value from the
```
